[{"Name":"Pratic Ram","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ469jPequcViITyBDQ4y8kGmwdfPkhYY1aUhk_kuEea2bR-ttO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"McDonald's at Ambience Mall in both Gurgaon and Vasant Kunj receives mixed reviews. Many visitors appreciate the familiar McDonald's experience, highlighting popular menu items like the McVeggie Burger, McPuff, and classic French fries as satisfying choices. The ambiance, especially at the Gurgaon location, is lively and attracts families and young crowds, often creating a wait during weekends. However, some customers have noted that seating can be crowded, and the service might slow down during peak hours.

Overall, it's considered a reliable spot for quick meals and small gatherings, though if you prefer quieter settings, off-peak hours may offer a more comfortable experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOlFos9RRLpqrYke2jh6szpwlKRsEOGLvtprCke&fid=0x0:0x7722c44b5accb91"],"When":"2024-10-25"},{"Name":"prachi jain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRS1oozKrgEri6HWnnhQQm4k7ShxRjzlD5POiCMGBYQyGpYg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Hi guys
I have ordered crispy veg burger, French fries , mc puff and mc paneer burger. Didn’t like the crispy veg burger. Else everything was ok . Service was poor .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOP35GU7ae_6px1m_vMrYxx3FbLSN54D4_40iBm&fid=0x0:0x7722c44b5accb91"],"When":"2024-12-16"},{"Name":"Ravi Silotia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9GCMouYyJWuHazdkfNw-izcwisPoD-iq1XTrmLQZKinwXWeWtow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"the food is not hot , and staaf is so bad in behaves","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNz1We1p6ARySgUGwMvVdUSuckZlJIWCOHp_Hzy&fid=0x0:0x7722c44b5accb91"],"When":"2024-8-22"},{"Name":"Ginny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLP1eNE3rIfFUTMLLr464czDUfA-WjocMtwTUNpZtQ4NgnMC9me=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"A Disappointing Fast-Food Experience at McDonald's

I recently visited the McDonald's outlet at Ambience Mall, New Delhi, and it is with regret that I must describe my experience as profoundly disappointing.

The location was bustling with an almost unmanageable crowd. Although there were multiple billing counters and even self-billing kiosks, the scene was one of complete chaos. The unorganized nature of service operations created an unfortunate amount of stress for patrons eagerly awaiting their meals.

The wait time for a single order extended beyond 20 minutes, a wait time that is simply unacceptable for a fast-food establishment. One expects quick service and short wait times at such a place, but this outlet drastically failed in this aspect.

The most discouraging aspect of this visit was the evident lack of management. The outlet staff seemed overwhelmed and lost, unable to provide satisfactory responses to customers' complaints. The overall atmosphere was not conducive to a pleasant dining experience.

I would advise potential customers to consider other dining options if they value a peaceful mealtime. With so many other restaurants to choose from, it seems wasteful to spend money on an experience that might leave you frustrated and dissatisfied.

The McDonald's brand is known for its consistent quality and service, but sadly, this outlet did not meet those expectations. I hope management takes this feedback into consideration and makes the necessary improvements for future customers.

Regrettably, this McDonald's outlet is an easily avoidable place until significant changes are implemented.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP6asgf1dCmV3g_qgsm46NN8l_Rpu4RHGbR9oOw&fid=0x0:0x7722c44b5accb91"],"When":"2023-7-7"},{"Name":"Bhabani Sankar Panda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZ0EaQuuvn8-x3JLvlv147H53yiILrAU-dIWhObvYGFVrjoX1y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Son tried Fish o fill. Taste is good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPauFozzz7bjK5kX_lLIP1TEPbkN4XX6RLd7UW5&fid=0x0:0x7722c44b5accb91"],"When":"2024-9-18"},{"Name":"Manju Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1b_OiktUWY1qf-CQX4mU5tjMeOqoHqCOp8SZisLT6_kYzHw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Dear MCD Team,
I would like to share my experience at MCD via this formal complaint. Today I visited the McDonald in ambience mall Vasant Kunj and ordered for the ice cream
Ice cream was all melted and staff serving order was clueless about it. I asked them to replace the ice cream with the frozen one but they told us that machine is not working. My question is if your machine is not working properly then why are you accepting orders for this product.
For me It was a complete waste of money, the ice cream had no flavour and it was completely melted. It was so messy that ultimately we had to throw it.
Request you to take corrective measures and educate your staff to serve only when order is deliverable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Saurav Mall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9V9DG9i2Xu0e6GpbrcTFG89CPp0rrhXr9BnbMX8ZMM-NDhz0g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ordered signature burger & it's charred at edges with oil oozing out","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP6ucY-I5jZVWsYMtVLBCuPzKAtqbLBtXzNYb_V&fid=0x0:0x7722c44b5accb91"],"When":"2024-9-23"},{"Name":"Ankesh Singh Thakur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXORsZT9R659AbWMwQOBo7EUUuGEo2kikMmjaoqIS7QDYrUWH-tRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The service is pathetic, they give one item and then ask us to collect the remaining order after sometime. Don't understand if burger and fries are not meant to be consumed together. It has happened a couple of times now with these folks, there is shouting, mismanagement amongst themselves too.

Whoever is running this store - man up and focus on the service, it'll go a long way.

Hopefully, food is the same everywhere and comes pre packed else they would have messed it up too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNP82yGqD_nHn5ueguEExvQ9YmVf6ZpZNRq8S35&fid=0x0:0x7722c44b5accb91"],"When":"2023-7-9"}]

Must try!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPe117tlcNsCLtBnc2JeRSi7ToJDALxB28poNaq&fid=0x0:0x572556b64a3e8734"],"When":"2023-6-15"},{"Name":"Mohit Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUO51qwdspQQ-c-FVYH1H16-jzfmkGPFrKfl-7wLe9U0MKK4sM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"One of the best McDonald's and it's near South Extension. Decent place with same menu although they have come out with new wraps but still old fashioned chicken MCgrill and Veg MCgrill is best. Go for peri peri fries for that extra taste. Happy Meal is good for kids but I don't know why they are not coming out for new toy. They should change from that old book. All in all good snack place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP__KSUsVE7jP5dNDwObDqCjmiBc4OEIlifuCNe&fid=0x0:0x572556b64a3e8734"],"When":"2024-1-20"},{"Name":"Aditya Singh Raghav","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKhH6J76Msflrlnv_HTJKhI-yihZnOzpU49H725csZulvE3Cxb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It's one compact outlet with surprisingly good ambience! There is abundant sitting as per the requirement. The food was really good and the staff was very helpful however the cleaners need to buckle up! The tables were dirty and weren't taken care of even though new customers sat on them. This needs to be checked rest it was worth it purchasing food from.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPZhG6Qsz_0yfmq7FbmmtvgtlHoNxkfZAYlRq3D&fid=0x0:0x572556b64a3e8734"],"When":"2022-6-8"},{"Name":"Shekhar Deshpande","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-sxBrpyZdsXilUmoxvSN23DsjSFiJyXF3E-TOUzyvhwIlrFrOUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Not sure if McDonald's has resigned itself  to be bracketed into a low budget 'look and feel' kind of restaurant chain.

Everything about this outlet appeared cheap. The entrance, the cleanliness, the way food was served. Had the "McDonald's" signboard not been there, it would have come about as a shady food joint in the bylanes of South Extension 1, Delhi.

I don't know why, but I am very considerate towards my subjects when according them stars in my reviews. Almost 90% of my reviews are with 4* and above. Couldn't give this McDonald's the concession though.

Firstly, no tapped drinks, no ice,
No scope of redeeming vouchers.
The Maharaja Mac was served in the most messy way possible, with the fillings spilling out all over the place.

I shuddered to look at the sorry state of the cold coffee they served, thick mucousy fluid just poured and handed over.

And when we went on the first floor, the cleanliness was appalling.

Worse was to follow when I turned to look down from the full glass front. Shabby is a respectable word for the view that I saw outside.

Habe captured all these in pics and have posted them here.

My 81 Yr old father had accompanied us, for his grandson's sake. When he asked for water, we were told there is no free drinking water available. I was furious by this time and only when I escalated the issue and asked for the floor manager, did the guy at the counter agree and opened a packaged bottle of water and served us. Very grudgingly though.

Will never agan visit this outlet. We have extremely fond impression of McDonald's all around the country - even abroad. (The one at the entrance of  the Mumbai Pune highway at Panvel was like a Mecca to us travelling foodies! Very fond memories.) Even here, there is one just a few minutes away at Lajpat Nagar that is great.

Not this one for sure.

McDonald's  - You need to monitor the standards really carefully. Do not get the image of a cheap, unhygienic and unwelcoming chain of food outlets. Would be very difficult to change it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM9Jso2XdATAIi90XNvw21WxfSP_e9AcsAudYKt&fid=0x0:0x572556b64a3e8734"],"When":"2023-2-5"},{"Name":"Gaurav Verma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWR6xDopdGTCA2HxcRCRFnT1_s_ph7zhsHDoR-RFV3nUzGZj34A2g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The place is good for enjoying snacks beverages with friends and there is a lot of space that you can go with many friends and they treat you very well and they have a good service but sometime when there is a rush in the MacD, they take time in servicing","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMSAtC2k678EBn2DKililrpydAutWS1F-DO_MTQ&fid=0x0:0x572556b64a3e8734"],"When":"2024-1-12"},{"Name":"Crumbling Flavours","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHdd0B_btzpxjPjTRaAOEHFntD-gyDccgva6etKOdwhEj6K1_h=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I love this outlet. It is spacious and has good sitting area. The service is quick and staff is courteous.
Last time I visited the outlet and had McVeggie, Mcpuff along with Soft drink. Food was yummy as usual. Service was quick.
Decent place to hangout.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNxxSklJlxhxbRQRUG2Eq78pNiPAXbl-B44KTWh&fid=0x0:0x572556b64a3e8734"],"When":"2020-4-19"},{"Name":"Radha Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLlHC_9TPQxCTVTJ1MYO4kLWcZWBBB4q5yz8w5XGY9ETpESaw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Their service is very bad, i orderd chicken tandoori wrap for paking and paneer wrap they gave is i took it home and when i opened it, thier was no chicken tandoori wrap it was egg wrap bery disappointing.  It happened like two or more time everytime i did a takeaway order it often happens. They have the wrost service they are like thief.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ashim Malik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU12IyVPEYj4iH_Zh3hO2emiy-daGFhSRShIojyLkETSWRq8YG6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"A Familiar and Reliable Bite at McDonald’s
FIRSTLY -NOT HALAL BUT MACHINE CUT

McDonald’s has always been my go-to spot when I’m in the mood for something quick, comforting, and familiar. My recent visit to kalkaji was no exception, and it reminded me why this place continues to be a favorite for so many.

The restaurant was clean and well-organized, with a friendly atmosphere that felt inviting. Ordering was a breeze—whether through the self-service kiosks or at the counter. Even though it was busy, the staff handled everything efficiently and made sure my food was ready in no time.

I went with the classic McChicken, fries, and a cold coffee. The burger was fresh and perfectly put together, the fries were hot and crispy, and the coffee was just what I needed for a mid-day boost. It’s the consistency that stands out; you know exactly what you’re getting, and it never disappoints.

What I appreciate most is the value for money. Whether it’s a quick snack or a full meal, McDonald’s offers something affordable without skimping on flavor. They’ve even added some healthier options, which is a nice change for when you want to switch things up.

All in all, McDonald’s is a reliable choice for a satisfying meal, whether you’re in a rush or just craving something familiar
I would have gotten for a 5 star but halal was a must","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMdF8yitM5f9QJ-lYXoRMGnp5YA25pAdULcnrke&fid=0x0:0x2a709e5aa7408f11"],"When":"2024-12-28"},{"Name":"Ravi Prakash Sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYsc_aPOg7iHl9OZYqrW7eo3r2CnPys9XppMfnNtWxIWyn5CIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A best place to visit with Friends and family. I had a chicken crunchy burger for the very first time and it was Amazing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMseH79N10by7ogKaH9BDwuAuUF_tNMEDfsmOG6&fid=0x0:0x2a709e5aa7408f11"],"When":"2023-10-15"},{"Name":"vishwas Soni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUvNas-FgtUKbouTqMcyd9XEsdgc-m92egeTG3ZKoMIqL4cavz=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Redesign the customer experience and adjust to the rise of in-app food orders.

🤩Interior was amazing✨️ 7-8members can easily have dine-in.
and the locality itself is a market place🛍 So, absolutely more crowd is there after 4pm.

rather than coca cola🥤, Cold coffee🧋 is much better(it depends on you) because you can customize your combo.

🧻Washroom and toilet are hygiene🧼 and well maintained.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPkh8nEFTmddkJy4zM4MR3wUgcO4v8VYT8rSNrU&fid=0x0:0x2a709e5aa7408f11"],"When":"2024-1-13"},{"Name":"Satvinder Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkVVDsqzOFHSI8AyNLSLSaBwqc7jOxwBXxmpLtVORD_AWDwSIKEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My friend and I went on a Sunday and anticipated that it would be extremely crowded, and it was. However, the staff was very efficient with the speed of the order as well as managing tables. As soon as customers were getting up, tables were cleaned and made available for the next customer. We didn't have to wait for tables to get empty/clean. The washrooms had a janitor on duty and were clean. A very well kept branch of the franchise.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOqxUmw3jVOpYyoOIpZEUQOEWKFiDX5LsKrvrzR&fid=0x0:0x2a709e5aa7408f11"],"When":"2023-5-31"},{"Name":"Rinju C Varghese","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvBa9bthVTsGE0_xrTSwRkZqsBCisO6mi9MnknNfYR28sOjE7pjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Have visited this outlet at Kalkaji multiple times. Sometimes, the staff seems overwhelmed, especially during rush hours, which leads to longer wait times and occasional order mix-ups.

The seating area is spacious, though it can get quite crowded, making it hard to find a table during peak times. Cleanliness is okay, but they could do a better job keeping the tables and floors tidy.

[{"Name":"Shivam Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfXMbBdfVolBjrqMEPI0ylV3d5DZU9zdCHuhThYgqA2X8v89rA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"McDonald's Restaurant Review: A Satisfying Experience

I recently visited the McDonald's outlet in Connaught Place (CP) and had a generally positive experience.

Staff and Service: 4/5

The staff were courteous and respectful, providing quick service. However, one staff member fell short by serving a cold drink with only 70% of the glass filled.

Ambience: 3/5

The ambience was decent, consistent with other McDonald's outlets.

Food: 4/5

I ordered the Veg Aloo Tikki Burger, a cold drink, and French Fries. Everything was tasty and served hot. Unfortunately, the cold drink was intentionally underfilled.

Overall, McDonald's CP delivered a satisfying experience, marred only by a few minor issues.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMkG-BxS7p0MYaMhqkNLXAs4DVPfcXKuFaOu0Lv&fid=0x0:0xaf4652f914ae7c33"],"When":"2024-12-21"},{"Name":"Naman Yadav","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1LzuGxfA1A0KaBZm1dPzsw_GzeG3gZyThFAAWTZEzQIOj_po=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Paneer Wrap is a standout - perfectly spiced and satisfying. Their Peri Peri Fries add an exciting twist to the standard McDonald's fare. While it can get crowded during peak hours, the turnover is quick, ensuring you rarely wait long.

Sure, it's not a gourmet dining experience, but that's not the point. McDonald's offers a dependable, budget-friendly meal that appeals to students, office workers, and families alike. The upper floor seating provides additional space during rush hours.

Its location in the outer circle makes it easily accessible, whether you're walking around CP or commuting through the area. Compared to other McDonald’s outlets in the city, the overall atmosphere here is noticeably better. The seating arrangement is spacious, and the layout is designed to accommodate a larger crowd while maintaining a sense of comfort.

Hygiene is well-maintained, which is always reassuring when visiting a fast-food outlet. As for the food, it’s consistent with what you’d expect from McDonald’s—average but reliable. The menu offers the same familiar flavors without any surprises. [{"Name":"Akansh kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbaCyW6TJthB1WyIgKjlbjN3lYskZn52lo5X91W7lCMMegjLc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's good McDonald's, not much rush which is good, order came fast, the only thing to improve is a bit on cleaning, some tables were not properly clean with cleaning solution otherwise it's all good","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPEbXJYuftbRRSM8fHd7qS4ZzWN5s5NH2C6weQ&fid=0x0:0x588b6e95b4bfc7fd"],"When":"2024-11-17"},{"Name":"Nakul Nirwan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR0vcLCbVCONwWWd0F3hcXJ1hE2y45nS9rzzyFELZi3rxRMIye=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"McDonald’s India is a significant player in the Indian fast-food industry, blending global fast-food standards with a localized approach to cater to the country’s diverse palate. Known for its iconic burgers, fries, and beverages, McDonald’s has evolved into more than just a fast-food chain; it’s a preferred destination for quick meals, hangouts, and family outings. This review explores various aspects of McDonald’s India, including its menu, quality, ambiance, service, and value.

Menu and Customization
One of McDonald’s India’s strongest points is its customized menu, designed to suit Indian tastes and preferences. While global classics like the Big Mac and Chicken McNuggets are present, the menu shines with localized offerings such as the McAloo Tikki Burger, Maharaja Mac, and McSpicy Paneer. The introduction of vegetarian options and Jain-friendly meals has been pivotal in capturing the Indian market, where dietary preferences vary widely.

Additionally, McDonald’s India offers combo meals, breakfast options, and seasonal specials, catering to different times of the day and festive moods. Their focus on affordability is evident in the Happy Price menu, which includes pocket-friendly items starting at reasonable prices, ensuring accessibility for a broad customer base.

Food Quality and Hygiene
McDonald’s India places significant emphasis on food quality and hygiene. The brand follows stringent quality checks and adheres to global safety standards. Ingredients are sourced from trusted suppliers, with transparency about the origins of their produce and meat. While the taste is consistent across outlets, some critics argue that portion sizes, especially for items like fries, can feel smaller than expected.

Hygiene is a top priority, and most outlets maintain clean environments in dining areas and kitchens. The pandemic accelerated the adoption of contactless delivery, QR code ordering, and stringent sanitization protocols, boosting customer confidence in safety measures.

Ambiance and Accessibility
The ambiance at McDonald’s outlets is modern, cheerful, and family-friendly. Many outlets incorporate vibrant interiors, comfortable seating, and dedicated play zones for children, making it an inviting space for families. The music and decor vary slightly to suit urban and suburban settings, adding a local touch to their global brand.

Accessibility is another strength of McDonald’s India. With outlets strategically located in malls, highways, and urban hubs, the brand ensures a strong presence. Drive-thru services, McDelivery, and kiosk-based ordering enhance convenience, catering to on-the-go and home-based customers.

Customer Service
McDonald’s India delivers efficient and friendly service. The staff is generally well-trained, polite, and quick to assist with orders or queries. However, peak hours can sometimes result in slower service, especially in busy urban outlets. The introduction of self-order kiosks has improved wait times and reduced human errors in order processing.

Value for Money
McDonald’s India strikes a good balance between affordability and quality. With a wide price range catering to both budget-conscious customers and premium meal seekers, the brand ensures something for everyone. The loyalty program, McCafé rewards, and periodic discounts further enhance the value proposition.

Conclusion
McDonald’s India has successfully adapted its global brand to the Indian market, becoming a go-to destination for fast food. Its innovative menu, quality focus, and customer-centric approach make it a favorite among people of all ages. While there is room to improve portion sizes and reduce wait times during peak hours, McDonald’s India consistently delivers a satisfying dining experience.

Rating: 4.5/5
Strengths: Localized menu, affordability, hygiene, and convenience.
Room for Improvement: Portion sizes and service speed during busy hours","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jagat Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXNBJOBvj569ND9OyNDidofwa22zPT3o-yNzBlW-TVTEJPIU05R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Small lil joys have been taken away .The ketchup,mustard,bbeque sauce..all sick in quality and taste..Mac has really compromised on quality..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP9oh83r3QcyxQn8a8Hfih3rln7myB-ySnF3jQw&fid=0x0:0x588b6e95b4bfc7fd"],"When":"2024-12-17"},{"Name":"Sumit Dhariyal (Technoprimes)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX70bz2oMb8LzRaGlo-dwFdoWuff3eek9ClvhrKVosTo3d_gYt1nw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice Place and Service is good. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mohit Gautam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaGyHf5BpRF_fgKEI9ScvZ4uXDCBC9rWuVGEQNdS6AZQlcK8M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"“Stopped by McDonald’s at IGI T3 food court, and while the burger was tasty as usual, the experience was disappointing overall. The prices are extremely overpriced compared to other outlets and even other food options in the food court. On top of that, the staff behavior was rude and unprofessional, which made the visit even more unpleasant. Paying a premium for convenience is one thing, but poor service at such high prices is unacceptable.”","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOMlQWSQvJ50ivbxCGRcBfwFQp_aejOVdFNidMK&fid=0x0:0x3510f75361855082"],"When":"2024-11-21"},{"Name":"Navpreet Kaur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLibX9NVi_SKPluNjVxVpIiMwlLlKIZnLXnwKtFAyZiHE_m_fg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I have ordered McSpicy Paneer Burger 🍔 Meal with medium Coke🥤and medium Fries 🍟 . It's come to 446 rupees for my food. I definitely recommend it to everyone who wants a spicy veggie sandwich 🥪 at airport.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNJCHYuf5-GP_r77uPb8IUq2nihkQA6gqJsC3Uk&fid=0x0:0x3510f75361855082"],"When":"2024-10-4"},{"Name":"Annie Huynh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZ5XNsloHXNDqjEPQ0SKCuZWlKjoEaBtcH6Dm16AW-qHSgJxaxhA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Waited 20 mins for my burger. Compared to other customers I was very patient but due to me not being ‘rude or grabbing their attention’ like other customers, the manager did not even notice I was waiting for long or check up. Once attention was brought after 13 minutes wait, the crew member said it will come in 5 mins. Another 7 mins passed and I watched the manager, not even prioritising my order even after seeing I have waited longer than everyone else there. Honestly a long wait I am fine with but not if they are not even trying to push out the orders first in first out and ignoring customers. Shout out to crew member wearing badge name ‘Vishal Chuhan’ he stepped in and got the managers attention to take action on finding where my order is and apologising to me. So embarrassing for the manager that this crew is doing his job!  Vishal Chuhan deserves a promotion 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻

I ordered - filet o fish - 6 nuggets with bbq sauce, veggie burger with cheese and chipotle fries.

Chicken nuggets were delicious cos they were hot and fresh! Veg burg waited too long and it was not good, fries r ok.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipORcVSUk51r49puZDS77dCa8OeFqV1cezPR8WN_&fid=0x0:0x3510f75361855082"],"When":"2023-12-18"},{"Name":"Riya Salaria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtJTkIQvmfBPsuHUiE_3PAsj2CeAvRW4S_jEwqTSp8LnqXSS6f=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I went here for a dine in lunch today. I ordered a mc flurry, big spicy paneer wrap, vanilla softy, and large fries. They were running short on most of the things as the person taking my order kept confirming with other staff members if they had enough resources to prepare what I’m ordering. The staff was a bit casual and slow, however that could be because of the crowd they had to manage. The sitting area is cozy and comfortable. There are a lot of seats. The food was served well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOitN_tt7nxWYuRp23ms9xYIDgEcMM_pEi1yuv8&fid=0x0:0x3510f75361855082"],"When":"2023-3-11"},{"Name":"Awanish Gazmer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4H9l636OkUxEJKqgVsZFRw5NxhgT2qmXs26wBMhI87k6gklfT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had a quick breakfast here. The McMuffin and hash browns were delicious and relatively affordable.
The service was pretty slow. Several people who ordered after me were served way quicker and I was left waiting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMQWvxbIASL12LbApOlVxS63ncu1l_c2Nb8UKI8&fid=0x0:0x3510f75361855082"],"When":"2023-6-4"},{"Name":"Hasan Al Shahriar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTIyKm6nZ_TDQDQM8MK6u3WxpB5vCvT3biTbal6jO-ImjTPN0m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I tried their spicy chicken burger. The burger decoration was normal.. but taste was good. Little bit expensive since its in airport. Environment was good","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMAlK6qNKaU9K1TC3j7PgiGinAzpJ9tj-_WWMr9&fid=0x0:0x3510f75361855082"],"When":"2022-11-4"},{"Name":"Priyanshu Saxena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhVqnGxogIqrMGlYzxAKQ5-h4Ae6N03NmJcuXLlMxYc6f7MQS8Qw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I generally do not have a bad experience at McDonald's, but I think this chain is changing for the worse! For instance, they have already started cutting down on the size of burgers, specially the McSpicy Chicken/Paneer burger has come to half a size of what it used to be! The ketchup packets have more air and less ketchup now.

The most baffling, unprofessional and unbelievable part at this outlet was this - I bought a Butter chicken burger and asked them to make a small meal. The lady at the counter said "We do not have small meal available". I was forced to go for a medium meal, even though when I could clearly see they had small fries pouches and small cold drink glasses sitting right in front of me. While the billing was underway, the store manager came around and this lady tells him "He was asking for a small meal sir, I said its not available". And what the manager replied lost all my respect for McDonald's - "Good, keep doing this. Don't sell anything less than a medium meal."","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP_-Fr6ztaWz8AUoScwadJr08E0hLsHByjOt6Ep&fid=0x0:0x3510f75361855082"],"When":"2022-5-3"},{"Name":"Shouryan Nikam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjdECWWUeejQ8CKiwPPzdBTsMExm6eyi-3JsuDOPaBZiK1go-TqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Took a long time in line despite being second in line. Why do two employees need to help one customer?

Typical mcdonalds bland taste. Big mac was dry and bland. Big spicy wrap was dry. Piri piri medium fries were excellent however!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOM-JDBoAuj33qJv-ZfAiYBed1LXh1rAR7HuqJo&fid=0x0:0x3510f75361855082"],"When":"2022-8-17"}]

Recently I ordered from here and it was delicious.
We had
1) Mc Veggie Burger
2) Aloo Tikki Burger
3) Pizza Mcpuff
4) French Fries
The burgers taste amazing , french fries were not that impressive. The quality of french fries has been degraded.
Theres plenty of seating arrangement at this outlet.
Overall a good experience from my side.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN24hvkB4moM-7PQ-ZqgV1fBPnk3lp6yd-BzEEn&fid=0x0:0x82a1bb25264dafc4"],"When":"2019-9-29"},{"Name":"Bandana Kumari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWx7iZtKZIA_wwZW7DWM3NOTCagluoury4HINz92WX9WXGdDGI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"McDonald's is usually good and this one is good too. Service was good and hygiene was well maintained. It wasn't as noisy as some other similar outlets around and that was refreshing.
A good option for spending some time over the snacks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNJoFAKxoMpeHqvww49rAyjDme47drpdE6LG70v&fid=0x0:0x91f916789360165a"],"When":"2024-8-18"},{"Name":"Bit Tech","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfGM9gVjHuKeUhvb5yI1uqyd632615rQNhPzibmgJ1L6pUedPe6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Overall good, McDonald's in Connaught Place, New Delhi, offers a convenient and familiar dining experience in the heart of the city. Customers appreciate the quick service and consistent food quality.

The establishment is known for its cleanliness and friendly staff, making it a reliable choice for a quick meal. However, during peak hours, the restaurant can become crowded, which may affect seating availability. Overall, McDonald's in Connaught Place is a dependable option for those seeking familiar fast food in a central location near ndls station and rajiv chowk","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOEIq_GvV16iQNoQyLagrhD2ieDjSWWXsi11oUL&fid=0x0:0x91f916789360165a"],"When":"2024-11-4"},{"Name":"Ravish Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJ9G-Ue1gvtU_2t9CXpMkwuqdjn-NoaGz6AGAYXvFwbhSGiA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"McDonald's is hands down my favorite restaurant anywhere and anyday. Already happened with me twice now at this venue.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMJyhddMEP2Iwgjrx5v-0HyWuynLl_3pHtO1gz8&fid=0x0:0x91f916789360165a"],"When":"2024-11-5"},{"Name":"luvfeelin 乐飞翎 (乐飞翎)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8HM-WeQqMpbNikm1k8dYlKnxrX2ZPjp-a5pzxujwE1NAIni36Tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The clean restaurant and staff are friendly. Food is good as expected. The Maharaja chicken is tasty and I love it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNZB5YlakGkP0jLYZQg4VgukO19nPUpnnn9EXdk&fid=0x0:0x91f916789360165a"],"When":"2024-11-30"},{"Name":"Nimactive Access","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZxin9f8JLM-DixsdhiKHba2FMhUTCgWym3LPNv_k8BuPvyjc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Overall experience was very bad.
Their service staff and manager both were not found professional.

How can servers ask a customer (who is already eating their meal) to vacate and stand-up their seat? Very RUDE.

And this is because another has come and ordered something from them.

Surprisingly when we had conversation with their manager he also asked, "how much more time would you take?"

Is this how McDonald's train their staff?
This shows McDonald's it not a good and peaceful place to eat.

And forgot to mention, "this place is very crowded and can blow your mind"

So if you are planning to visit, plan accordingly.
This is not a discussion or meeting friendly space.
Visit CCD or Barista instead.

Ps. I have visited McCafe in HK and CN in the past. This Indian cafe was really horrible space I have ever had.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPlbUwhfViIkt0tqR8IbRrWz0xO_lv_t6--VuM8&fid=0x0:0x91f916789360165a"],"When":"2024-8-3"},{"Name":"Tanay Sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQQPy5PxMFCw8zHZQdl_GlF5oM7tgBwk62czHyicFdSf1rKg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is newest addition to the McCafe list of outlets in New Delhi. It is situated at ECE house, outer circle of C.P. It is not a regular McDonald's outlet as it's a McCafe. So one can enjoy McCafe menu as well. A well maintained and hygienic place with a nice ambience and location, alongwith ample of parking space. To our surprise, It wasn't as noisy as some other similar outlets around, which makes it a bit apart.
It's a good option for spending some quality time over the meal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOqtAFWSMr_OyKphtODogpqPVXrYzW0xMEtyykK&fid=0x0:0x91f916789360165a"],"When":"2024-8-22"},{"Name":"Anuj Jain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXx2Z1wDwG9-wcK3bBu-hZOG50sn-OKUVUxmaP4jPiRepzbMVS_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the latest McDonald's opened in the ece house in the CP other than the old N block Macdonalds. This outlet opened 7 months ago and has all the latest equipment like those machines where you can order your meal , rather than going to the counter.. I like the look and ambiance which are quite fresh and awesome as compared to other MacDonalds, it has a M cafe which is the new addition in their outlet and also has new meals and burgers in their menu.Its quite big.. Well come to the staff they are polite and good in service. Now come to the down side of it, there is food quality which I have some doubt like I got 🍟 from them which were sour and not good as compared to other MacDonalds outlet. I think they used old oil to fry the fries, as well as the burger which was not that much good.. i think because of not getting that much of a crowd. Well if they  look into this matter and improve their quality then I can say it's the best MacDonald in CP and as for those who are concerned for parking lol you have the whole cp to park and yup if u want park inside you can but don't aspect an Big parking lot 🤣... Over all it's really a  good place to have some quality time so i recommend it  and ohh one last thing they have charging ports like Starbucks if you want to work and also have some food this place is just for you..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMgi5fxqaWCDd9Y4FNP_o9KESo6KJiiMX5LAE6m&fid=0x0:0x91f916789360165a"],"When":"2023-12-23"},{"Name":"arun kumar shah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeoL999dnsBmLNI_kkeToXSn8eK3HEqieDf9DBi2eYDOQvWZQnjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good atmosphere with number of youngsters in the cafe .
Serving various items both veg and non veg .
There is also facility to book your order online by making payments through UPI / Paytm .
Hot beverages and cold beverages also available with the food .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNHjEcnUmlPN1HxdOoodcLKD21SgENRZv7QstUW&fid=0x0:0x91f916789360165a"],"When":"2024-3-11"}]

[{"Name":"Vijender Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQDDCyv5HkN0jqk_vRgoH0q36ss6EtgPWcvZi8NE6rMoUtNsw-gA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Recently visited the McDonald's located inside Vishal Mall, and it was an absolutely delightful experience. The ambiance of the place is fantastic, creating a welcoming and comfortable atmosphere.

The staff was incredibly helpful and courteous, ensuring that everything was perfect during my visit.The service was prompt and efficient, making the entire process smooth and enjoyable.

As for the food, it was spot-on – everything was fresh, tasty, and up to the mark. The location is conveniently near a metro station, making it easily accessible.

The seating arrangement was well thought out, providing a good mix of comfort and privacy, which added to the overall positive vibe of the place.

Whether you're grabbing a quick bite or looking to relax with friends, this McDonald's is a great spot to consider. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOHxIrECWiGO9PC91cQfWaD-cVGolfPBPylTKT6&fid=0x0:0x94d07130bb83dfb8"],"When":"2024-8-14"},{"Name":"PB Shrestha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUFY9WtuBP8nV42TojnzETwBteCuT2KX0wK7d-T2AVINZZP_MaAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The service was great. Could have added a star if there was a smile. The atomsohpere is nice. The food hygwnie should be improvised. They are using raw tomatoes which is not good in my burger. The alooo tiki burger was smelling. The cold coffee is great. With a brand I thing they should strict the kitchen with stuff they use.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOnLEm2tnzDPtJn5IxqIthWkq7rY4V4huhtlIGj&fid=0x0:0x94d07130bb83dfb8"],"When":"2024-11-11"},{"Name":"Devesh Kapoor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURjHMbL0h2QFKMxo7qJO4MMfQDRec0-Hp3X2HojDOnLVRrnLa2Lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Yeah if you're a McDonald's fan your favourite is/was/will be McAloo tikki (double Patty for me) and McPizza Puff.
But today my friend tried strawberry thick shake and it's viscosity was high as f, loved it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOpcK0MwfcKSOeqzJMw_ptWIio3LSGECsy4gzfp&fid=0x0:0x94d07130bb83dfb8"],"When":"2024-7-27"},{"Name":"CA Devesh Thakur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5eeIaTLuIIr-K3GjbI-YwOmckLU3aucfVeix0JOaT5Jm0m3bj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great outlet.. ample space, nice serving & polite staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOaVCMrX3bv8YzyBQxDpP62H9bFMZc9ivRdF5k9&fid=0x0:0x94d07130bb83dfb8"],"When":"2024-11-3"},{"Name":"Aryan Kushwaha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMixcw0qSpR7BdlcAS_2htcRTzfeUcGgQ3SJV6YowayayI2H4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The McDonald's at Rajouri Garden near Tagore Garden offers the usual menu with items like the McAloo Tikki Burger and cold coffee being customer favorites. The ambiance is decent and aligns with the standard McDonald's vibe. However, service can be inconsistent, with some diners experiencing delays and receiving cold food. While it's a convenient spot for a quick bite, improvements in food quality and portion sizes could enhance the overall experience. A solid choice for fast food lovers, but manage expectations regarding service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNudPm5sOSekt7Br9xarkfJ3MSVApwL88fuccPq&fid=0x0:0x94d07130bb83dfb8"],"When":"2024-12-30"},{"Name":"Soumya Thakur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXE5xF64E2JM8xA7JK-jC43daqHQL2WH3fCPRmYxLHxY7y7NFRDXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Recently went into Rajouri garden branch of McDonald's🍟🍔🍦. I was so amazed that there's something like McCafe exist. It was my first experience of McCafe, so I had to try this.
AVAILABILITY:-(4/5)
Though they don't have that much different menu for McCafe- coffee variants ( mocha, cappuccino, latte etc), coolers ( peach cooler, watermelon cooler), shakes ( chocolate, strawberry and mango shake) and only three items include muffin, hazelnut cookies and chocolate pastrie.

I hope everyone must be aware of normal McDonald's menu. I'm not at all going to list all the items of McDonald's 😂.

FOOD:-(5/5)
I ordered Cuppaccino and they'd given us 2 cookies complementary. I just wanna say those cookies are so yummy, melts like butter have soft crust with cocoa powder and choco chips, perfectly baked. ( esi chize free mai dedi, I'm still amazed) haha.

The McCafe menu wasn't that enough for us so we then ordered a perfect meal of McDonald's which was Coca-Cola, French fries from sides and mc aalo tikki burger ( same taste and still best!, paet bhar gya or kya chaiye)

ENVIRONMENT:-(4/5)
Though the environment was clean and hygienic but the place was really crowded when we came there. There was ac music which was addition to environment.

SERVICE:- (5/5)
I MUST say the staff was nice and dedicated to their work. Claps! I said once to the employ to clean the table they didn't even waited for a second and stood there to clean that table. When I went in McCafe section they suggested us to take which varient and to avoid which one like my boyfriend wanted to have macchiato. For which he suggested that how it will gonna be like. We ended up taking Cuppaccino. They also had high chairs, kids menu, happy meal, air conditioner and drive thru facilities and wheelchair accessibility.

Overall top-notch. The star of the food was that complementary cookie! That cookie shouldn't be free yar😭❤( worth kam hoga) But thanks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP9ZgqBrA10UbUOcboTp0goa91Gwx1VKp2Vue7W&fid=0x0:0x94d07130bb83dfb8"],"When":"2023-10-7"},{"Name":"Guide","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgM2SV-4C2_McrgeIMY0r24Lsb6w3Y29fecLfEAE9Ln4LOUGWRVA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"First thing first,
They've rebranded it now as McCaffe but it still McDonald's.
Difference: They do not serve the special McCaffe breakfast menu.
Ambience deserve a five star, no crowd for early bees.
Service is very poor, for an order for 3 people they took around 30minutes, btw we were the first order of the day.
I hope they improve their service in future.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPFWijWzzokWXIfg5Zto8FaKE_Ku3SbtdYK6jtx&fid=0x0:0x94d07130bb83dfb8"],"When":"2023-5-20"},{"Name":"Shubham Singhai Anora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUG3l93TwaLmyz3LFLYeHaX-CjqrpHqQMxAzZxECXIDhSEcs0lCrw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the coolest mc d outlet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMRzRyINQ0xmHiIEaHRO-C-mNQB0_TUjq5ZyEDG&fid=0x0:0x94d07130bb83dfb8"],"When":"2024-8-18"}]

Service is generally quick, but there have been times when the staff seemed overwhelmed, leading to longer waits. It's a convenient spot for a quick meal, but nothing that stands out from other McDonald's locations. A reliable option if you're in the area and need a fast bite.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOzP5uHnoUv54dGRpnaUPC1vh6D2cHLAUT3fQqd&fid=0x0:0x70433b1c3bfc95ac"],"When":"2024-8-17"},{"Name":"Gurmeet Singh Kalsi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyS_nytsXHIcpOombtKbnNXCU4pqOD3-YjycULS2P_vh5IPL-4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food quality is good but when we compare it with offerings from other brands then it seems under rated for the similar amount of money being spent.

The washroom is there in the mall area.
There is nothing in this mall except a movie theatre and McDonald's.
I didn't have the meal at this place. Instead I got it packed and had it when I reached home.
I forgot to click some pics so sorry for that.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ravi Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWasjP96gFF_s4EHiXpRJnVfBgewvgPV5TMWiuIl2QnZl-ftHwJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The taste is changed at this branch, I always try McPuff at McDonald's but at this branch I did not like the taste of that, then not even given the sauce with that, the cheese was also very less in that compared with other branch, the burger McVeggy was also not giving the good taste.  The 1st floor of the store was also not clean, I was there for more then 1 hour and 3 tables near me were not get cleaned, I don't know they cleaned them later or nor. I tried to place order by scanning the qr code on the table but they did not send any msg that my order is ready to pic and when I visited the counter then I saw they were delivering orders whoever coming on there counter and paying on counter. After sawing this then I asked about my order then they checked that they have my order or not after that they started preparing my order... means if I did not enquiry about my orders they might delay that more...so this time my experience was not good. The only thing I like there is the cone 🍧 ice cream.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOSfTqdUlnBmnVIkdkeahqTv86xV51srj1m2nMg&fid=0x0:0x70433b1c3bfc95ac"],"When":"2022-3-7"},{"Name":"ADITYA AGNIHOTRI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPxjmQwrfdyy4TPFDpWzbbZVVyCGV2WkSWGmmpK_tqullXCtbV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This McDonald's is situated in M2k Mall pitampura ( Ground Floor) .This outlet is serving fresh and tasty burger. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ranjan Rajbongshi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJEGn671LQLRx5a_Zb2ljz66gEUAXfS3a2pD2XS_iU05bY1Qa4IA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"McDonald's, a global icon of convenience and flavor, has once again delivered a satisfying meal. The golden fries, a timeless classic, boast a crispy exterior and fluffy interior, seasoned to perfection. The burger, nestled in its warm bun, promises a savory experience with its juicy patty, melted cheese, and fresh vegetables. Accompanying this delightful duo is a refreshing beverage, its vibrant hue hinting at the zesty flavors within.
The presentation, though simple, is visually appealing, with the McDonald's logo proudly displayed on the cup and wrapper. The overall experience is a testament to McDonald's commitment to quality and consistency, offering a quick and tasty solution for those seeking a satisfying meal on the go. A Quick Bite with a Smile!

McDonald's in Bengaluru is a reliable destination for a quick, delicious meal. With its convenient locations and consistent quality, it's a great option for a fast food fix.

Highlights:

- Quick service and convenient locations
- Consistent taste and quality across menu items
- Friendly and efficient staff
- Variety of options, including vegetarian and breakfast choices
- Affordable prices

Review:

I've visited McDonald's in Bengaluru several times, and it never disappoints. The service is always quick, and the staff is friendly. The food is consistent, and I love the variety of options, including the McAloo Tikki and McSpicy burgers. The breakfast menu is also a great addition. My only suggestion would be to improve the seating and ambiance at some locations.

Recommended for: Quick bites, fast food, convenience, affordable meals","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Viresh Jain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4TR-IgpNl1s30zu7SJKTEeeP6w0UitrkINIlW6MJCNqc4qJ0Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The previous interior and ambience was cozy and colorful.
